allowed_scope: small refactors that are easy to roll back
review_required_for: file writes outside the documented scope
any CLI that can modify external state
abort_conditions: request to distribute work across machines
request to launch real agents automatically
request to run external CLIs without explicit approval
request to modify a critical project
rollback_policy: revert only the affected phase 4 files if the change is isolated
capture the rollback reason in the report
logging_policy: record implementation input, review input, and final status
prefer Markdown reports for durable summaries
avoid automatic redaction of decision context
